promotionGates: No unreviewed critical findings may remain in the web3 readiness audit.
Measured local-devnet gas must stay within the budget table.
Runtime qualification must be green on the candidate revision.
Reviewed promotion manifests must bind one exact manifest hash, release id, deployment policy id, CREATE2 salt namespace, and environment-specific approval artifact before any rollout begins.
Deployment manifests must remain deterministic templates with operator-filled addresses reviewed before any live promotion.
Promotion qualification must prove reproducible CREATE2 rollout across fresh local devnets and emit explicit rollback plans on failure.
External publication still requires hosted workflow observation and operator approval.
